changelog:
## Kernova fabric 26.1 v1.0.1-release

- Minecraft: 26.1
- Loader: fabric
- Pack version: 1.0.1-release (release)
- Mods: 26 available (25/27 listed + 1 dependencies)
- Unavailable: ThreadTweak, YOSBR (Your Options Shall Be Respected)

### Notes

- PackPing update checks now use the matching Kernova feed for Modrinth and CurseForge installs.
- Update notifications now send players to the matching download source for this Fabric build.
- The in-pack PackPing config now identifies this build as `1.0.1-release`, so installed clients compare against the correct pack version.

## Kernova neoforge 26.1 v0.1.1-beta

- Minecraft: 26.1
- Loader: neoforge
- Pack version: 0.1.1-beta (beta)
- Mods: 19 available (18/22 listed + 1 dependencies)
- Unavailable: Entity Culling, Noisiumed, Smooth Boot, WI Zoom

### Notes

- PackPing update checks now use the matching Kernova feed for Modrinth and CurseForge installs.
- Update notifications now send players to the matching download source for this NeoForge build.
- The in-pack PackPing config now identifies this build as `0.1.1-beta`, so installed clients compare against the correct pack version.
